style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>reduce fan-out or stop run</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="240" x="1415" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="risk-2" parent="1" style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>fan-out 中止 / 再実行</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="240" x="1415" y="566" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="risk-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=14;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#94A3B8;strokeOpacity=60;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=14;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>urgent / tiny / collision</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>blocking step が近いなら local only</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="240" x="1415" y="642" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="risk-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=14;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#FF8A30;strokeOpacity=60;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=14;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>implementation-critical + weak QA</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>reduce または skip fan-out</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="240" x="1415" y="726" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#14B8A6;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>Devil's Advocate・Material Design・second-pass lanes を fan-out 前に確保</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="870" x="460" y="348" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#FF8A30;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans Producer 実行</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>named subagents が 2-4 本の独立 slice を担当</font><br><font style='font-size:11px;color:#FED7AA'>scope / non-goals / finish line / QA inventory / producer_done</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="870" x="460" y="424" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#14B8A6;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=16;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>3. manager_provisional_acceptance</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>producer ごとに manager_acceptance (= provisional acceptance) を記録</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="870" x="460" y="508" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#14B8A6;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=16;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>4. second_pass</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>qa_verifier or peer_verifier を各 producer に実行</font><br><font style='font-size:11px;color:#99F6E4'>record second_pass_status</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="870" x="460" y="584" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#FF8A30;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=16;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>5. manager_synthesis_draft</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>returned findings + changed file list + material review status から統合草案を作成</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="870" x="460" y="668" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=18;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#FF8A30;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=16;spacingRight=14;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>6. devil_audit</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>cross-slice audit で disposition を返す</font><br><font style='font-size:11px;color:#FED7AA'>missing evidence / owner / required action</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="870" x="460" y="744" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=22;fillColor=#0B1220;gradientColor=#111827;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#F8FAFC;strokeWidth=2.5;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontSize=14;fontColor=#F8FAFC;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=18;spacingRight=16;spacingBottom=6;" value="<b>7. final_accept</b><br><font style='font-size:12px;color:#CBD5E1'>all producers: manager_acceptance = accepted && second_pass_status = pass</font><br><font style='font-size:11px;color:#FED7AA'>material_design_status = pass|not_applicable / disposition recorded</font><br><font style='font-size:11px;color:#99F6E4'>then final answer / merge / handoff</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="870" x="460" y="828" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bottom-title" parent="1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=16;fillColor=#111827;gradientColor=#0B1220;gradientDirection=southEast;strokeColor=#14B8A6;strokeWidth=1.8;fontFamily=Noto Sans x="710" y="980" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="status-4" parent="1" rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(20, 184, 166), rgb(0, 141, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(20, 184, 166), rgb(0, 141, 126));
